findings.message: The planned parity gate only proves "committed generated file == current generator output." It does not verify the stated migration target at lines 40/72, namely matching the current `packages/themes/reception/tokens.css`, so an incorrect initial `tokenVarMap` or post-processing step can still ship with green CI.

This assumption is wrong. `packages/themes/reception/tokens.css` does not currently contain `color-scheme` declarations, while `packages/themes/base/src/build-theme-css.ts` always emits them, and the plan also explicitly accepts a new `--theme-transition-duration` var at lines 94/532. That means this is not an "identical semantic content" retrofit as written; it introduces behavior deltas that need to be called out and validated explicitly.

A required package-contract change is only buried in rehearsal notes. `packages/themes/reception/package.json` currently lacks `./theme-css-config`, but no active task or acceptance block owns that edit, so TASK-02 has a hidden prerequisite and the generator import path is left underspecified.
